task: Build with large Megabloks for the nth time with n blocks
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white pegboard with a grid of holes is on a green surface. A black peg is inserted into the top-left hole. The peg is small and cylindrical. STRATEGY - To build with the peg, first grasp the peg, then transport it to a new position on the board, and place it. Failure modes include dropping the peg during transport or misaligning it with a hole. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the peg at its top for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the peg's top for secure hold; Step 3 transport the peg to a new hole; Step 4 place the peg into the new hole.
Goal: stacked({peg})
Scene: peg, pegboard
Step 1: reach(peg)
  affordance_region: the top of the black peg
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, peg, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, peg) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(peg)
  affordance_region: the top of the black peg
  contact: holding(peg) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(peg)
Step 3: transport(peg -> pegboard)
  affordance_region: an empty hole on the pegboard
  spatial: above(peg, pegboard, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(peg)
  done_when: above(peg, pegboard, 0.05)
Step 4: place(peg -> pegboard)
  affordance_region: an empty hole on the pegboard
  contact: surface_contact(peg, pegboard) [completion]; released(peg) [completion]
  pose: stable(peg) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(peg, pegboard) AND released(peg)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top of the black peg
the top of the black peg
an empty hole on the pegboard
an empty hole on the pegboard
